stemHtml: When comparing an elevator trim system with a stabiliser trim system, which of these statements is correct?

options.a: An elevator trim system is able to compensate larger changes in pitching moments.
options.b: An elevator trim system is better adapted to larger flight speed ranges.
options.c: An elevator trim system is more suitable for aeroplanes with a large CG range.
options.d: An elevator trim system is more sensitive to flutter.
